nasb.text: Oh that I had one to hear me! Behold, here is my signature; Let the Almighty answer me! And the indictment which my adversary has written,

esv.text: Oh, that I had one to hear me! (Here is my signature! Let the Almighty answer me!) Oh, that I had the indictment written by my adversary!

cnv.text: 但願有一位肯聽我的， 看哪！這是我所劃的押， 願全能者回答我， 願那與我爭訟的寫好狀詞。

ccb.text: “但愿有人听我申诉！ 看啊，我在这里画押，愿全能者回答我！ 愿我的控诉者写好状词！
